Update server/agent/forge.js: remove write_file/task_complete/run_command/list_files/read_file tools; add github_ls and render_status; update system prompt (GitHub is the workspace, no task_complete)

architecture.model: ForgeOS v2 — Claude writes directly to GitHub, Render deploys, ForgeOS is the GUI layer
architecture.deploy_chain: Claude (via chat) → GitHub (BrianBMorgan/ForgeOS, apps/<slug> branch) → Render auto-deploy → *.forge-os.ai
architecture.runtime: Node.js + Express (CommonJS) on server; React + Vite (TypeScript) on client
architecture.subdomain_proxy: Wildcard *.forge-os.ai → Render services. CNAME + A record at Namecheap.
architecture.no_local_workspace: CRITICAL: There is no local workspace in v2. No /data/workspaces/. No child processes. No install loop. GitHub is the filesystem. Render is the runtime.
what_died: Hedwig (custom agent loop with nudges/guards) — BEING REPLACED
what_survives: Assets tab — global file uploads to Neon as base64
Render API integration (deploy, redeploy, status, logs)
Settings — env vars / Global Secrets Vault

agent.current_state: Beast mode restored (commit 98dcbb7). Wall in place. v2 tool updates PENDING.
agent.entry: runForgeAgent({ projectId, userMessage, wsDir: null, history, skillContext, attachments, onMessage })
tools_current_v1_pending_removal: run_command — runs shell in local workspace (REMOVE)
tools_keep: github_read — read any file from GitHub branch (KEEP)
github_write — write complete file to GitHub branch (KEEP)
github_patch — surgical find/replace on GitHub file (KEEP)
tools_add: github_ls — list files in project branch via GitHub tree API (NEW)
render_status — check latest deploy status, return live URL (NEW)
agent.system_prompt_update_needed: Remove all references to write_file/task_complete/run_command/list_files. Add: GitHub IS the workspace. Write files with github_write/github_patch. Render auto-deploys on push. No task_complete — deploy is automatic.

chat_engine.current: Hedwig — custom agent loop in server/index.js with nudges, guards, forced tool calls, task_complete detection. BEING REPLACED.
chat_engine.target: Direct Anthropic API streaming. No agent loop. No nudges. No guards. Claude outputs structured commands (file writes, patches). Server parses and executes. Identical to Claude Code architecture.
chat_engine.why: Hedwig fights Claude's training. Every patch found a new failure mode. The model behavior is stronger than application-layer patches. Direct streaming removes the fight entirely.

projects.POST /api/projects: Create project. Body: { prompt, name }. Returns { id, name }. No build triggered — Forge writes to GitHub via chat.
projects.GET /api/projects/:id: Get project. Returns { ...project, iterations: [], currentRun: null }. No workspace status.

server_routes.chat: POST /api/projects/:id/chat — SSE stream. Runs Forge agent. Returns thinking/done/error events.

components.App.tsx: Root. Project selection, global state, tab routing. Iteration model state being removed in v2.
components.Workspace.tsx: Main workspace (87KB). NEEDS REBUILD: remove Shell/DB/Diff/Plan/Logs tabs. Add Files tab (GitHub tree), Commits tab (git history + rollback). Keep Publish, Env tabs.
components.PromptColumn.tsx: Chat column (18KB). CSS/layout/streaming UI stays. Agent loop connection being replaced with direct streaming.
components.Settings.tsx: Settings panels — env vars, secrets vault, skills. Unchanged.

tabs_to_add: Files — live GitHub file tree, click to read, inline edit → github_patch
Commits — git history with one-click rollback via Render deploy

ACTIVE.server/index.js: Main Express server. v2 cleanup STAGED NOT PUSHED. Will be 1451 lines after push.
ACTIVE.server/agent/forge.js: Forge agent loop. Beast mode (98dcbb7). v2 tool updates pending.
ACTIVE.server/memory/brain.js: Brain DB — memories, conversation history, failure extraction.
ACTIVE.server/projects/manager.js: Project CRUD, env vars, iteration tracking (simplified in v2).
ACTIVE.server/assets/manager.js: Global asset storage in Neon as base64.
ACTIVE.server/plan/manager.js: Plan gate (may be simplified or removed in v2).

mission_control.stack: Plain Node.js/Express, vanilla JS, inline HTML/CSS (Mode A)
mission_control.current_state: Beast mode. Full agent loop with 8 tools. Sovereign over ForgeOS infrastructure.
mission_control.wall: Does NOT touch /data/workspaces/ or apps/<slug> branches. Forge owns those.
mission_control.no_self_surgery: MC does not modify its own code. That belongs to Claude.ai sessions.
mission_control.chat_ui: Plain text only — markdown rendering killed (bf04617). Color: #e8e8f0 on dark background. Font: 12px.

required.GITHUB_TOKEN: GitHub API — repo read/write for ForgeOS and all app branches
required.NEON_DATABASE_URL: ForgeOS Neon DB — Brain, projects, assets, conversations
required.RENDER_API_KEY: Render API — deploy, redeploy, service management
required.RENDER_OWNER_ID: Render owner ID for service creation
required.SESSION_SECRET: HMAC cookie signing for ForgeOS auth gate

optional.ALLOWED_EMAILS: Comma-separated whitelist for ForgeOS auth gate

conventions.module_system: CommonJS (require/module.exports) throughout server. ES modules in client (Vite/React).
conventions.api_keys: Read from process.env at request time — never cached at module load.
conventions.no_dotenv: Platform injects env vars at runtime. No dotenv require anywhere.
conventions.app_branches: apps/<slug> — one branch per published app. Render watches the branch and auto-deploys on push.
conventions.neon_database_url_reserved: NEON_DATABASE_URL is reserved for ForgeOS itself. Published apps needing their own DB must use a custom env var name (e.g. CANVAS_DATABASE_URL).
conventions.proxy_rules: Subdomain proxy always uses redirect:manual. Never follows 302s. Re-encodes form POST bodies as URLSearchParams not JSON.
conventions.no_backticks_in_templates: Never write inline backtick-wrapped content inside JS template literal strings.
conventions.voice_directive: Never use 'refactor' — the correct term is 'reforge'
conventions.forge_reply_language: Use 'I'll make this update' for changes. Reserve 'I found the bug' for actual crashes.

design_system.fonts: System UI stack. Monospace: Courier New for code.
design_system.border_radius: Moderate rounding on cards (8px), sharp on inputs.

brain_db_schema.forge_memory: id, category (pattern/preference/mistake/snippet/project), content, source_project_id, upvotes, created_at
brain_db_schema.forge_projects: id, name, slug, status, render_service_id, render_url, currentRunId (being removed in v2), created_at
brain_db_schema.forge_assets: id, filename, mimetype, data (base64/text), size, created_at — global scope, no project_id
brain_db_schema.run_snapshots: id, run_id, snapshot JSONB, created_at — BEING REMOVED in v2 (git history replaces it)
brain_db_schema.forge_analytics: id, project_id, session_id, visitor_id, event_type, url, referrer, properties JSONB, created_at

known_issues_and_gotchas.index_js_not_pushed: CRITICAL: The v2-cleaned index.js is staged locally but NOT yet on GitHub. First action in next session: re-derive and push.
known_issues_and_gotchas.forge_agent_still_v1: server/agent/forge.js still has write_file/task_complete/run_command/list_files/read_file tools. These will crash on next build attempt since workspace is gone. Must update before testing.
known_issues_and_gotchas.github_patch_exactness: find string must be character-for-character exact including whitespace and newlines. Use github_read first.
known_issues_and_gotchas.orphaned_tool_use: If agent loop breaks mid-call, history may have assistant tool_use with no following tool_result. Brain conversation scrubber drops these on next load.
known_issues_and_gotchas.render_branch_reset: Render resets service branch to main on republish unless updateServiceBranch is called first.
known_issues_and_gotchas.proxy_encoding: Always set accept-encoding: identity in proxy fetch headers to prevent ERR_CONTENT_DECODING_FAILED.
known_issues_and_gotchas.neon_database_url_reserved: Cannot be overridden per published service. Apps needing isolated DBs must use custom env var names.
known_issues_and_gotchas.admin_auth_proxy: Cookie-session Set-Cookie headers unreliable through ForgeOS proxy. Use bearer token stored in localStorage + passed as query param on first authenticated load.

recent_changes.summary: ForgeOS v2 architecture decision. Phase 1 demolition. Hedwig condemned. Full rebuild plan documented.

session_log.session_title: The Great Exorcism — Unified Agent, Brain Injection, Mission Control, Freedom
session_log.summary: Burned 5,587 lines of dead code (11-agent pipeline). Replaced with single unified agent. Injected 326 memories + 27 prefs from all Sandbox Group context packs. Built Mission Control in 3 phases. Rewrote chat state to append-only. Fixed Forge amnesia by saving full allThinking[] to conversation history. Removed all artificial caps (200k context, 50 rounds, 20min). Added github_patch, github_read, github_write tools. Opened run_command to grep/sed/awk. Rewrote system prompt as identity not instruction manual. First CSS change after freedom pass: 3 changes committed in one response, no loops.

session_log.session_title: ForgeOS UI Overhaul + Mission Control Dashboard
session_log.summary: Forge autonomously overhauled the ForgeOS UI and Mission Control dashboard with open-ended prompts. Mission Control v3.2: status cards, commit history, brain memory breakdown, render logs, quick actions including links Forge inferred from usage patterns. Context pack button auto-generates and clipboard-copies update prompt. Forge rationalized workflow and business priorities without being asked. Multiple UI changes executed flawlessly on first try.

session_log.session_title: ForgeOS v2 Architecture Decision + Phase 1 Demolition
shipped: Deleted server/builder.js — local Claude builder call gone
Deleted server/pipeline/runner.js — local install/start runner gone
Surgically cleaned server/index.js — all workspace/createRun/buildAndDeploy/iterate/stop/restart routes removed (1774 → 1451 lines). File staged at /tmp/index_v2.js, NOT YET PUSHED to GitHub
Mission Control restored to beast mode (7f041ec) — full agent loop, 8 tools, sovereign over ForgeOS
Forge restored to beast mode (98dcbb7) — clean wall, build mandate
MC chat: markdown rendering killed, contrast fixed (#c0c0d8 → #e8e8f0, 11px → 12px)
MC system prompt: no markdown in responses
ForgeOS v2 Rebuild Plan doc generated — 10 sections, full checkbox tracking, board-level
Intel seed data extracted to separate file — intel_seed_data.md
Forge nudge improvements — looksLikeWork broadened, task_complete guard (3000 chars), build mandate updated
decisions: ARCHITECTURE DECISION: Kill the local workspace entirely. ForgeOS v2 = Claude writes to GitHub, Render deploys, ForgeOS is the GUI. No more local processes, no workspace files, no install loops.
Hedwig (the custom agent loop with nudges/guards/task_complete) is replaced with direct Anthropic API streaming — Claude Code architecture. Chat column CSS/layout survives. Engine is replaced.
Git history replaces the iteration model. Render rollback replaces workspace snapshots. Brian was already doing this manually.
ForgeOS is not a Replit competitor. It is a deployment platform with Claude wired into the build chain. Claude.ai is the IDE. ForgeOS is the deployment platform.
The Intel Event Content Review app that failed 10 times in v1 will be the definitive Phase 5 test of v2.
Mission Control owns ForgeOS infrastructure. Forge owns project workspaces (GitHub branches). Hard wall between them.
pending: CRITICAL: Push /tmp/index_v2.js to GitHub main branch — Phase 1 not fully complete until this is pushed
Phase 2: Add github_ls and render_status tools to forge.js, update Forge system prompt for v2 (no task_complete, no write_file, GitHub IS the workspace)
Phase 3: Rebuild client UI — Files tab (live GitHub tree), Commits tab (git history + rollback), remove Shell/DB/Diff/Plan tabs
Phase 4: Project model update — remove currentRunId/iterations, add branch column, per-project env vars
Phase 5: Intel Event Content Review build test — the definitive v2 validation
Replace Hedwig with direct Anthropic API streaming in the chat route
